zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Morville於大約1118年出生在英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯時，他的父親Hugh de Morville35歲，母親Beatrice de Beauchamp30歲。他於大約1136年與Ada d’Engaine在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1105年在英國波藍德被列為constable of scotland。他去世於1167年在英國英格蘭波藍德享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Morville于大约1118年出生在英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯时，他的父亲Hugh de Morville35岁，母亲Beatrice de Beauchamp30岁。他于大约1136年与Ada d’Engaine在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1105年在英国波藍德被列为constable of scotland。他去世于1167年在英国英格兰波藍德享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Morville was born about 1118, in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, his father, Hugh de Morville, was 35 and his mother, Beatrice de Beauchamp, was 30. He married Ada d’Engaine about 1136, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1105, his occupation is listed as constable of scotland in Cumberland, England. He died in 1167, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Morville est né environ 1118, à Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Morville, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Beauchamp, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ada d’Engaine environ 1136, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1105, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of scotland à Cumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1167, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Morville um 1118 in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Morville 35 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Beauchamp 30. Er hat um 1136 in England Ada d’Engaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1105 ist sein Beruf als constable of scotland in Cumberland, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1167 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Morville è nato il circa 1118 nel Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Morville, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Beauchamp, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Ada d’Engaine circa 1136, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1105, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of scotland nel Cumberland, England. Morì nel 1167, nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Morvilleが約1118年にイギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズで生まれた時，父Hugh de Morvilleは35歳，母Beatrice de Beauchampは30歳であった。約1136年にイギリスでAda d’Engaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1105年，イギリスクウンバーランドでの職業はconstable of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1167年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドで50歳で死去した。

ko.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Morville(이)가 대략 1118년 영국 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Morville(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Beauchamp(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1136년 영국에서 Ada d’Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1105년, 그의 직업은 영국 c벌랜드에서 constable of scotland이었다. 그는 1167년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Morville nasceu aproximadamente 1118, em Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Morville, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Beauchamp, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada d’Engaine aproximadamente 1136, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1105, sua profissão aparece como constable of scotland em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1167, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Morville родился около 1118 г. в местности бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Morville было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Beauchamp, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada d’Engaine около 1136 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1105 году он работал по профессии constable of scotland в местности кумбирланд, Англия. Он умер в 1167 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Morville nació aproximadamente 1118, en Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Morville, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Beauchamp, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ada d’Engaine aproximadamente 1136, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1105, su ocupación registrada era constable of scotland en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Murió en 1167, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
